pattern: A single left-to-right scan groups the array into maximal strictly-increasing runs, summing each run and remembering the largest total seen.
hints: Walk the array once, accumulating a running total for the current strictly increasing stretch.
Whenever the next value is not greater than its predecessor, the current run ends, so reset the running total to that value.
Track the best running total observed across all runs and return it; a lone element is a run of length one.

edge_inputs.description: a later short run beats an earlier longer one
whole array is one increasing run
best run sits in the middle after a long decrease
equal neighbours break a run (strictly increasing required)
strictly decreasing, answer is the largest single value

stress.description: random small positives so runs start and break frequently
